profile.major: Arts, Technology & the Business of Innovation
profile.belief: You win when someone forgets the technology exists and just sees a completely different place.
profile.working_on: Overlaying forgotten neighborhood histories via AR so a walk through your block becomes a time-travel narrative

hidden_prompt: Somewhere in this room is the person behind "Animating character fear through micro-gestures—eye flickers, breath catches—so subtle audiences feel it before they know they're watching." Go find them.
magic_inference: You are driven by a desire to reconnect people with their community's rich past, transforming everyday spaces into immersive, meaningful experiences.
